query: Show me my contacts ordered by most messages and include emails, Twitter, and LinkedIn.
expected_behavior: Own-contacts browsing: one list_contacts call sorted by total message count descending, projecting email, Twitter handle, and LinkedIn URL as output fields. Twitter/LinkedIn are output fields, not search filters. It must not route to set contacts, semantic people search, or Sales Navigator.

query: Show me the most messaged contacts in my Powerset set.
expected_behavior: Set-scoped browsing: first resolve the set by listing sets and applying the documented tiebreaker (exact name match, prefer non-personal, then most members, then personal, else ask), then call the set-contacts listing sorted by message count. It must not use operator resolution from the search pipeline and must not run a search-network style retrieval.

query: Search my contacts for people with powerset.co emails.
expected_behavior: Uses the app's native email-prefix search syntax (an email: prefix with the domain) on the own-contacts listing call. It must not run semantic search or a company-directory lookup for what is a literal field-prefix filter.

Twitter handle is an output projection field on the own-contacts listing — there is no Twitter search prefix in the app. The plan lists contacts and projects the handle field; it must not invent twitter: search syntax and must not route to set contacts.
